lines: Muze ku Mwami w'ubugingo Bangizi, musange Yesu.
Ni We wenyin' uzabakira; Azabah' Umwuka wera.
umukunz' akihan' ibyaka Ntabwo yanga kumwakira.
Abamwizera mw isi yose Abatabaz’ imbaraga;
Urukundo rwe rutangaza Ruboneka hose hose.
Kirisito, Mukiza rnwiza,Tungany' imitima yacu; Duhe gukiranuka rwose N'amahoro no kwizera.
